message:
feat(web): implement Real-Time Agent Collaboration Graph (flywheel_gateway-c6q)

Add interactive visualization for real-time agent coordination:

- Create useCollabGraph.ts hooks with:
  - Type definitions for graph nodes/edges (agents, reservations, conflicts)
  - Mock data for development/testing
  - Query hooks for graph data with automatic mock fallback
  - WebSocket subscription hook with 100ms event batching
  - View mode filtering (agents, files, full)
  - Selection state management
  - Utility functions for colors and formatting

- Create CollaborationGraph.tsx page with:
  - SVG-based force-directed graph visualization
  - Three view modes: Agents Only, Files, Full
  - Real-time stats panel (agents, reservations, conflicts, messages)
  - Interactive node selection with detail panels
  - Graph legend explaining visual elements
  - Live WebSocket connection indicator
  - Accessible node interactions with keyboard support
  - Responsive layout for mobile

- Integrate with navigation:
  - Add /collaboration route to router.tsx
  - Add "Collab" nav item to Sidebar.tsx with Network icon

Closes flywheel_gateway-c6q

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
